name: Creole Daube Glace'
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice olives and arrange in the bottom of a 6-cup mold.
2. Carefully sprinkle beef over olives.
3. In a large bowl, mix gelatin with half a cup of the beef broth.
4. Heat remaining broth to boiling; add it to the gelatin mixture and stir until
gelatin is completely dissolved.
5. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
6. Chill just until the mixture reaches the consistency of beaten egg whites,
then pour over olives and meat in mold.
7. Chill until firm; unmold and serve.
